date
Fri Oct 10 14:10:41 CEST 2025
make -C ./compare benchmark
go test -vet=off -timeout 24h -run @ -bench . -benchtime 5s | go run benchreport.go
goos: darwin
goarch: amd64
pkg: modernc.org/quickjs/compare
cpu: VirtualApple @ 2.50GHz
